pqr_criteria.criteria: The complete scope of work includes Design, Engineering, Supply, Installation, Testing, and Commissioning of the Chiller-Based Air Dehumidification system.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Water Chillers must be provided in a quantity of 2, each with a capacity of 300 TR.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Chiller compressor type must be Screw Compressor.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Chiller refrigerant must be R-134a, including the first charge of refrigerant and oil.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Chiller evaporator and condenser must be Shell & Tube type with SS 304 tubes.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: A double skin Air Handling Unit (AHU) must be supplied with a capacity of 53000 CFM.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: AHU must achieve an outlet air temperature of 22°C +/- 2°C.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: AHU must achieve an outlet air relative humidity of 45% +/- 2%.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: AHU cooling coil, coil casing, tubes, and header must be made of SS 304. Fins must be plain aluminum.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: AHU must include a pre-filter section with 10-micron filters.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: AHU must be equipped with a Plug fan with VFD.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: An induced draft Cooling Tower must be supplied, constructed of FRP (basin, casing, louvers), and sized for a 760 TR refrigeration load.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Cooling tower must be designed for a Wet Bulb Temperature of 29°C and a cooling tower outlet temperature of 33°C.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: A chemical dosing system for the Cooling Tower must be included.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: 3 Chilled Water Pumps (2 Working + 1 Standby) and 3 Condenser Water Pumps (2W+1S) must be supplied, suitable for a 600 TR load.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: All pumps must be centrifugal type with mechanical seals.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Pump motors must be IE-3 efficiency, TEFC, with class F insulation.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Pump MOC: Casing must be Cast Iron, Impeller must be Stainless Steel, and Shaft must be EN8.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Electrical power supply is 415 V / 50 Hz / 3 Ph. All equipment must be compatible.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Equipment and installation must be suitable for a safe, non-flameproof area where ammonia is present in the atmosphere.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Vendor must perform Pre-commissioning (Hydrotest, Pneumatic test, DOR check, no load run), commissioning, start-up, and GTR.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: The scope includes construction of a PEB shed for the Chiller and AHU, and foundations for pumps and the cooling tower.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: PLCs must be from an approved make: Allen Bradley, Honeywell, or Schneider.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Manual Valves (Ball/Butterfly/Globe/Gate/NRV) must be from an approved make: L&T, Weir BDK, HAWA, KSB, Sigma, Intervalve, INTEGRAL PROCESS, or Steel Strong.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Carbon Steel Pipes must be from an approved make: Maharashtra Seamless, Jindal, Tata, HI-TECH METAL, or Nippen Tube.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Stainless Steel Pipes must be from an approved make: Jindal, Prakash Steelage, Ratnamani, Unnati Metals, or HI-TECH METAL.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: The project site and delivery location is Plot- K1, Taloja MIDC Road, MH 410208.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: The system must be designed for ambient conditions of 35°C temperature and 57% humidity.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: A separate cost for operating the unit for a 1-year Operation and Maintenance service period must be provided.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: The overall project cost must be submitted in the specified format, breaking down costs for Engineering, Supply (Mechanical, Electrical, Instrument, Spares), and Construction.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General
